subheadline: Proposals, invoicing, inventory, crew scheduling, and customer messaging in one beautiful workspace — so you can focus on the lights, not the paperwork.
featuresTitle: Everything you need for peak season
featuresSubtitle: From first quote to takedown — one system your office and crew actually use.

features.title: Proposals that close
features.desc: Branded quotes with multi-year pricing and mockups — send from the truck in minutes.

features.title: Get paid faster
features.desc: Card and ACH invoices with deposits before install.

features.title: Inventory you trust
features.desc: Real-time stock, reservations, and low-stock alerts.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.desc: SMS, email, and portal notes with templates.

features.title: Mockup editor
features.desc: Show clients the finished look before install day.

ctaBody: Set up in minutes. No credit card required for your 14-day trial.
footerText: Built for installers who do it right.
